name: Chicken and Sausage Gumbo (Crockpot)
recipeIngredient: 12 ounces Fully cooked smoked sausage, links, sliced
1 10-oz package frozen whole okra, cut into 1/2-inch thick slices
recipeInstructions:
1. For the roux: In a heavy 2-quart saucepan, stir together flour and oil until smooth.
2. Cook over medium-high heat for 5 minutes, stirring constantly.
3. Reduce heat to medium. Cook and stir constantly for about 15 more minutes, or until a dark, reddish-brown roux forms.
4. Cool the roux.
5. In a 3½-, 4-, 5-, or 6-quart crockery cooker, place water.
6. Stir in the cooled roux.
7. Add sausage, chicken, okra, onion, green pepper, celery, garlic, salt, pepper, and red pepper.
8. Cover; cook on low-heat setting for 10-12 hours or on high-heat setting for 4½ to 5 hours.
9. Skim off any fat that rises to the surface.
10. Serve over rice. Makes 6 servings.
